testcase.name: test_get_all_products

failure.message: requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/products': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/products?

testcase.failure: tests/test_products_orders.py:11: in test_get_all_products resp = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/products") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:73: in get return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:59: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:575: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:484: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:367: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:438: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/products': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/products?

testcase.name: test_get_featured_products

testcase.name: test_admin_create_product

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?"

testcase.error: tests/conftest.py:15: in admin_token response = api_client.post(f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login", json={ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:637: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:575: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:484: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:367: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:438: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?
